channel.title: Number Theory on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Number Theory on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #0: Common Formulae — Legendre's Formula & Divisor Convolutions
item.description: Legendre’s formula, divisor and multiple convolutions in O(n log n), offline-difference batch processing for H(n)=Σf(d)g(⌊n/d⌋).

item.title: Number Theory #1: Elementary Number Theory — GCD, LCM, Euler, CRT
item.description: GCD/LCM properties, Bézout/Frobenius, Euler’s theorem with power-tower reduction and φ-chain technique, congruence system merging via exGCD, CRT, and n! prime factorisation via Legendre’s formula.

item.title: Number Theory #1.1: Divisibility Blocking (Floor-Division Decomposition)
item.description: Divisibility blocking for O(sqrt n) floor-sum evaluation: lemma, single-variable loop, O(1) interval sum requirements, two-variable min-trick, multi-variable pseudocode, and ceiling-division blocking.

item.title: Number Theory #2-ex: Möbius Practice — LCM Sums, Divisor-Count, Omega Numbers
item.description: Practice problems for Möbius inversion: LCMSUM, two-variable lcm sum (O(n^3/4)), FSF’s game with offline difference, divisor-count sum d(ij), Omega Numbers with Dirichlet suffix sum.

item.title: Number Theory #2-ex: Möbius Techniques
item.description: Seven core techniques for Möbius inversion problems: loop shortening, gcd indicator expansion, coprimality reduction, Dirichlet convolution via T=dk, divisor symmetry, diagonal symmetry, and value-domain cnt[] tricks.

item.title: Number Theory #2: Multiplicative Functions, Möbius Inversion & Dirichlet Convolution
item.description: Multiplicative functions, single-point and linear-sieve evaluation; Möbius function, both forms of Möbius inversion with full derivations and examples; Dirichlet convolution, key identities, Du Jiao sieve; generalized Möbius inversion on posets.

item.title: Number Theory #3: From Eratosthenes to Möbius Inclusion-Exclusion
item.description: Eratosthenes sieve for μ; g/f/h framework; Conclusions 1 and 2 with derivations and tables; GCD table intuition; CF 803F Coprime Subsequences with bottom-up and Möbius approaches.

item.title: Number Theory #3.1: Sieve Problems — Coin System DP via Sieve
item.description: Greedy optimality for divisibility-chain coin systems, DP over the maximum denomination, and a sieve-style transition by adding one larger coin.

item.title: Number Theory #4: Min_25 Sieve and Du Jiao Sieve
item.description: Min_25 sieve: theory, two complete examples, Lagrange interpolation for power sums. Du Jiao sieve: template, P3768, GCD sum, LCM sum.

item.title: Number Theory #4: Primality, Factorisation & Residues (Miller-Rabin, Pollard Rho, Tonelli-Shanks)
item.description: Miller-Rabin primality test, Pollard Rho factorisation, Tonelli-Shanks for quadratic residues, cubic residues via F_p[t]/(t^3-a), quartic residues by double square root, and general k-th residues via primitive root + BSGS, plus N-th residues mod composite.
